text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down roughly 3% over the past day, with Ethereum slightly underperforming, signaling broad-based weakness across major assets rather than a flight to safety within crypto. The Fear & Greed Index at 17 reflects extreme fear that has intensified over the past week, yet Bitcoin dominance remains elevated at 55.9%, suggesting investors are rotating toward the perceived safety of larger-cap assets rather than exiting entirely. Volume at $89B is moderate, indicating the selloff lacks panic-driven intensity but conviction remains low across the board.
